sheets.platform_sales: プラットフォーム売上現況

platform_sales_columns.4: プラットフォーム (always 'comico 日本')
platform_sales_columns.5: マスター作品名 (canonical title — use this)
platform_sales_columns.10: コイン売上(税込) — paid coin, tax-incl
platform_sales_columns.14: 合計 — paid + free coin, tax-incl
platform_sales_columns.15: (A)コイン売上(税抜) — paid coin tax-excl
platform_sales_columns.22: (A')コイン売上(税抜) — free coin tax-excl
platform_sales_columns.31: 精算対象分配金(税抜) — title-level total (only first row of group)

magazine_comic_type.total_amount_jpy: sum(col10) per title  (paid coin ONLY, tax-incl)

ads.rs: directly from col10 (0.3 for comic, 0.2 for magazine_comic)

type_classification.EP: magazine_comic AND title contains 【分冊版】 (or other magazine_comic)
type_classification.WR: title contains 【全年齢版】  OR  base title has sibling `title + 【完全版】`

sales_month_rules.comico jp: from (年, 月) columns of プラットフォーム売上現況 (usually settlement month - 1)
sales_month_rules.comico_ads: from (年, 月) columns of 広告売上 (usually settlement month - 2)

title_normalization.note: Titles in プラットフォーム売上現況 col5 already match GT channel_title_jp exactly, so no normalization needed. Specifically '～' (full-width wave dash) and '~' (half-width tilde) variants are preserved as-is, and markers 【完全版】/【全年齢版】/【分冊版】/【特装版】 are kept verbatim.

type_overrides.comment: Documented in アテンダンス rule: when a sibling `title + 【完全版】` exists, the base form is the all-ages (WR) edition. The parser derives this automatically; entries here are for human reference.
